sigWerErrors.reason: 'bir' (one/a) adds emphasis but does not change the overall meaning of the sentence in this context.
The substitution changes the subject from 'your helping' (olmanıza) to 'our helping' (olmamıza), which alters who is being referred to and changes the meaning of the sentence.
